conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution volume independent of molar mass
conditions.evidence_text: At the critical point of adsorption, a series of linear C4H9-PLA-OH's having molar masses (Mn) in the range from 2.3 £ 10[3] to 7.4 £ 10[4] ... showed no dependence of the elution volumes on molar mass. ... LC-CC conditions have been used corresponding to silica gel as the stationary phase and a mixture of 1,4-dioxane/n-hexane (56.25/43.75 by vol%) at 50 8C as the mobile phase.
conditions.notes: Critical conditions established for linear PLA used to analyze star-shaped PLA.
conditions.physical_address: Department of Polymer Chemistry, Center of Molecular and Macromolecular Studies, Polish Academy of Sciences, Sienkiewicza 112, PL-90-363 Lodz, Poland; Deutsches Kunststoff-Institut (German Institute for Polymers), Schlossgartenstrasse 6, D-64289 Darmstadt, Germany

conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution volume independent of molar mass (established on linear analog)
conditions.evidence_text: The series of starshaped PLA's have been analyzed by LC-CC ... with regard to possible structural imperfections. ... Measurements were carried out at 50 8C using the critical compositions that have been established for linear PLA (i.e. 1,4-dioxane/n-hexane 56.25: 43.75 vol%).
conditions.notes: Analysis of star-shaped PLA performed under critical conditions established for linear PLA. Separation based on number of arms (end-groups).
conditions.physical_address: Department of Polymer Chemistry, Center of Molecular and Macromolecular Studies, Polish Academy of Sciences, Sienkiewicza 112, PL-90-363 Lodz, Poland; Deutsches Kunststoff-Institut (German Institute for Polymers), Schlossgartenstrasse 6, D-64289 Darmstadt, Germany

conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution volume independent of molar mass (established on linear analog)
conditions.evidence_text: Eventually, LC-CC measurements of the elution volumes carried out for acetylated star-shaped PLA's (R(PLA-OOCCH3)x) have shown that for the interactions of the R-(PLA-OH)x macromolecules with the column packing the hydroxyl end-groups are mostly responsible.
conditions.notes: Acetylated star-shaped PLA analyzed under the same critical conditions established for linear PLA to demonstrate end-group effect.
conditions.physical_address: Department of Polymer Chemistry, Center of Molecular and Macromolecular Studies, Polish Academy of Sciences, Sienkiewicza 112, PL-90-363 Lodz, Poland; Deutsches Kunststoff-Institut (German Institute for Polymers), Schlossgartenstrasse 6, D-64289 Darmstadt, Germany
